html:
Relics (and Broken Relics) are the remains of the Ancient Civilization found in the Ruins. Broken Relics can be repaired with Rocks to restore 20 sanity. When destroyed, they can drop various items.

Tables and chairs can drop Rocks (80%), Cut Stone (10%), and Frazzled Wires (5%), with a rare chance to drop Gears, Green Gems, Yellow Gems, Orange Gems, or Nightmare Fuel (0.2% each).

A vase can drop Trinkets (10%), with a rare chance to drop Silk, Sewing Kits, Thulecite or a second Trinket (0.9% each). Breaking a Vase can also spawn a Cave Spider, Spitter, or a Splumonkey (0.45% each).

Plates, Bowls, and Dishes drop nothing.

Gallery

  • Broken chair.
  • Broken table.
  • Broken vase.
ResourcesCraftable Items

“Ancient household goods.”
–Wilson
“Old furniture.”
–Willow
“Is junk?”
–Wolfgang
“A leftover of an ancient world.”
–Wendy
“I HAVE NO NEED OF THAT.”
–WX-78
“A relic of an ancient civilization, lost to the ravages of time.”
–Wickerbottom
“I don't plan on fixin' that.”
–Woodie
“Remnants of an extinct civilization.”
–Maxwell
“Where has this civilization gone? I must find them!”
–Wagstaff
“Fit för Asgard.”
–Wigfrid
“These haven't been used in a while.”
–Webber
“Where's the ancient bed?”
–Walani
“Ancient kitchenware.”
–Warly
“Me wonders if me could sell it on th'black market?”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS THING FROM YONDER TIME”
–Wilba
“Old”
–Wormwood
“Someone moved out in a hurry.”
–Wheeler
“Hand craftsmanship is old hat. Mass production is the future.”
–Winona
“It's just a bunch of unfun stuff!”
–Wortox
“Old thing.”
–Wurt
“It's even older than the furniture at my grandpa's house.”
–Walter
“People back then weren't all that different from us.”
–Wanda
Relics (and Broken Relics) are the remains of the Ancient Civilization found in the Ruins. Broken Relics can be repaired with Rocks to restore 20 sanity. When destroyed, they can drop various items.
Tables and chairs can drop Rocks (80%), Cut Stone (10%), and Frazzled Wires (5%), with a rare chance to drop Gears, Green Gems, Yellow Gems, Orange Gems, or Nightmare Fuel (0.2% each).
A vase can drop Trinkets (10%), with a rare chance to drop Silk, Sewing Kits, Thulecite or a second Trinket (0.9% each). Breaking a Vase can also spawn a Cave Spider, Spitter, or a Splumonkey (0.45% each).
Plates, Bowls, and Dishes drop nothing.
